seoTitle: Blairmount vs Blakehurst — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Blairmount and Blakehurst. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Blairmount and Blakehurst.
heading: Blairmount vs Blakehurst — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Blairmount, New South Wales and Blakehurst, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Blakehurst has a lower overall climate risk score (44/100) compared to Blairmount (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Blairmount or Blakehurst safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Blairmount has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Blakehurst scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Blairmount scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. Blakehurst scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Blairmount or Blakehurst?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Blakehurst has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.23% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
